title_en: E2E Retrieval Study for Evidence Synthesis
abstract_en: This paper studies retrieval-augmented evidence synthesis for long context literature review agents. We compare datasets, metrics, and evidence extraction behavior.

title_en: E2E Long Context Benchmark for Literature Agents
abstract_en: We benchmark long context methods for agentic literature review with explicit evidence boards, comparison tables, and reproducibility notes.

title_en: Hidden Control Paper for Unrelated Vision Tasks
abstract_en: This control paper focuses on unrelated vision experiments and should stay outside the project-scoped views during E2E checks.
